home.bio: AI Engineer at Viettel Cyber Security & Research Assistant at AI Network Innovation lab.
home.bioSecondary: My research interests include AI and Deep Learning in general, espeacially algorithmic based topics.

introduction.title: Introduction
introduction.text:
Hi, I'm Huy Hieu Nguyen, an AI Engineer at Viettel Cyber Security and a Research Assistant at AINI Lab of BK Cyber Security Center (SOICT - HUST). I am based in Hanoi, Vietnam.

My current work focuses on federated learning and deep learning for Edge AI systems. However, I am particularly interested in machine learning and deep learning theory in general.

I graduated from university in 2025 with a Bachelor's degree in Computer Science. My goal is to continue studying and pursue a Master's and PhD degree in the field of Artificial Intelligence.

beyondWork.title: Beyond Work
beyondWork.text: I enjoy reading books about science and technology, especially topics related to Artificial Intelligence. I also love music and play guitar in my free time. I believe that balancing work and life helps me stay creative and productive.
